results.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?item WHERE {
  ?item rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?label)), "aceite"))
}
ORDER BY ?item
LIMIT 10

rdflib_key_entities: Operations at the interface. Minimize/Maximize the CNC. Show / hide the virtual operator panel. Show / hide the PLC message list. Show / hide the CNC message list. Show / hide the window for errors and warnings. Turn the CNC off. Work modes. To show the task window. MAIN MENU Main menu. AUTO Automatic mode. MANUAL Jog mode. EDIT EDISIMU mode. MDI MDI/MDA mode. [ CTRL] + [F10] TABLES User tables. [ CTRL] + [F11] TOOLS Tool and magazine table. [ CTRL] + [F12] UTILITIES Utilities mode. CALC Calculator. Browsing keys. [ CTRL] + [F1] BACK Previous menu. [ CTRL] + [F2] FOCUS Switch window. [ CTRL] + [F3] NEXT Switch screens. Two-colored key. Execution keys. [ CTRL]+[S] Cycle start key (START). [ CTRL]+[P] Cycle stop key (STOP). [ CTRL]+[R] RESET Reset key. SINGLE Single-block execution mode. The shortcuts for the [START] [STOP] and [RESET] keys are only available when the CNC is installed as simulator on a PC.
Browsing keys (MAIN MENU, NEXT, FOCUS, BACK)
FOCUS key. FOCUS It is used to switch between the different windows of the screen.

Function keys. Softkeys. F1 Keys F1 through F12 select the options of the softkey menus. Browsing keys. NEXT key. NEXT OEM configurable table. FOCUS key. FOCUS It is used to switch between the different windows of the screen. BACK key. BACK On the horizontal softkey menu, it may be used to go from a softkey submenu up to the previous menu. Help key. HELP key. HELP Display CNC help. Work modes. Automatic mode. AUTO Jog mode. MANUAL EDISIMU mode. EDIT MDI/MDA mode. MDI User tables (zero offsets, fixtures and TABLES arithmetic parameters). Tool and magazine table. TOOLS Utilities mode. UTILITIES Configurable mode. CUSTOM OEM configurable table. Browsing keys. Main menu. MAIN MENU Changing the state of an icon. In the MC/TC mode, it toggles between the standard and the auxiliary screens. Keys to move the cursor. The arrow keys move the cursor one position to the left, right, up or down. The previous-page or next-page keys show the previous or next page at the part-program or PLC program editor. The home and end keys move the cursor the beginning or end of the line. The tab key moves the cursor to the next field of the active menu. Editing keys. Delete. Delete. DEL Insert or overwrite. INS Escape key, to cancel the current action ESC without assuming the changes. Key to validate commands, data and ENTER program blocks of the editor. Recover data. RECALL Calculator (*). CALC (*) The calculator key is not available on all keyboards.

rdflib_key_entities:
| Instruction. |  | Meaning. |
| --- | --- | --- |
| $GOTO |  | Block skip. |
| $IF $ENDIF
$ELSEIF $ELSE |  | Conditional execution. |
| $SWITCH $CASE $ENDSWITCH
$BREAK $DEFAULT |  | Conditional execution. |
| $FOR $ENDFOR
$BREAK $CONTINUE |  | Block repetition. |
| $WHILE $ENDWHILE
$BREAK $CONTINUE |  | Conditional block repetition. |
| $DO $ENDDO
$BREAK $CONTINUE |  | Conditional block repetition. |
| Instruction. | Meaning. |  |
| L | Call to a global subroutine. |  |
| LL | Call to a local subroutine. |  |
| #ABORT | Abort the execution of the program and resume it in another block or program. |  |
| #ACS | Fixture coordinate system. |  |
| #ANGAX OFF | Turn angular transformation off. |  |
| #ANGAX ON | Turn angular transformation on. |  |
| #ANGAX SUSP | Freeze angular transformation. |  |
| #ASPLINE ENDTANG | Akima splines. Type of final tangent. |  |
| #ASPLINE MODE | Akima splines. Selection of tangent type. |  |
| #ASPLINE STARTTANG | Akima splines. Type of starting tangent. |  |
| #AXIS | Axis upon which the additive manual intervention is applied. |  |
| #CALL | Call to a global or local subroutine. |  |
| #CALL AX | Add a new axis to the configuration of the channel. |  |
| #CALL SP | Add a spindle to the configuration of the channel. |  |
| #CAM ON | Activate the electronic cam (real coordinates). |  |
| #CAM OFF | Cancel the electronic cam. |  |
| #CAX | "C" axis. Activating the spindle as ·C· axis. |  |
| #CD OFF | Cancel collision detection. |  |
| #CD ON | Activating collision detection. |  |
| #CLEAR | Channels. It clears the synchronism marks of the channel. |  |
| #CONTJOG | Manual intervention. Feedrate in continuous jog. | 
| #COMMENT BEGIN | Beginning of comment. |  |
| #COMMENT END | End of comment.
notes: GraphDB returned no rows while RDFLib did.
